title: BEM-540 task4 final system closure
objective:
Run script:
"""
base=Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem540')
reports=Path('governance/reports')
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
role_state_path=Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
contour_status_path=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
provider_state_path=Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
outbox=Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl')
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM540_FULL_SYSTEM_AUTOTEST_ROADMAP.md')
done=Path('governance/tasks/done/BEM540_FULL_SYSTEM_AUTOTEST_ROADMAP.md')
done.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
cycle='bem540-full-system-autotest'

required_artifacts=[
 base/'curator_intake.json', base/'preflight_checks.json', base/'analyst_system_plan.md', base/'auditor_plan_review.md', base/'system_development_artifact.md', base/'auditor_final_review.md', base/'curator_cycle_closure.md', base/'provider_failover_decision.json', outbox, transport, role_state_path, contour_status_path, provider_state_path
]
checks=[]
all_ok=True
for p in required_artifacts:
    ok=p.exists()
    checks.append({'file':str(p),'exists':ok,'bytes':len(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if ok else 0})
    if not ok: all_ok=False

# verify transport records for BEM-540 exist
transport_records=[]
if transport.exists():
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip(): continue
        try:
            rec=json.loads(line)
            if rec.get('cycle_id')==cycle:
                transport_records.append(rec.get('record_type'))
        except Exception:
            pass
required_record_types=['curator_intake','analysis','audit','execution','final_result','provider_failover_system_test','telegram_outbox_system_test']
record_ok=all(any(rt==got for got in transport_records) for rt in required_record_types)
all_ok=all_ok and record_ok

role_state=json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
contour=json.loads(contour_status_path.read_text()) if contour_status_path.exists() else {}
provider=json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text()) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}

final_status='PASS' if all_ok else 'BLOCKER'
blocker=None if all_ok else {'code':'BEM540_FINAL_VALIDATION_FAILED','checks':checks,'transport_records':transport_records}

final_record={
 'record_type':'system_autotest_final_result',
 'cycle_id':cycle,
 'source':'curator',
 'from_role':'curator',
 'to_role':'external_gpt',
 'status':'completed' if all_ok else 'failed',
 'artifact_path':'governance/reports/bem540_full_system_autotest_pass_report.md',
 'commit_sha':None,
 'blocker':blocker,
 'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:06 (UTC+3)'
}
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(final_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

role_state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 14:06 (UTC+3)'
role_state['cycle_id']=cycle
role_state['curator_status']='CLOSED' if all_ok else 'BLOCKED'
role_state['active_role']='curator'
role_state['next_role']=None
role_state['current_task']={'id':'BEM-540','title':'Full system autotest','status':'completed' if all_ok else 'blocked'}
role_state['blocker']=blocker
hist=role_state.get('history',[])
if not isinstance(hist,list): hist=[hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:06 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-540 full system autotest final closure','status':final_status})
role_state['history']=hist
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(role_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 14:06 (UTC+3)'
contour['last_full_system_autotest']={
 'id':'BEM-540',
 'status':final_status,
 'cycle_id':cycle,
 'task1_sha':'5a17ca55247e2794413019a10dd36948f48e28cf',
 'task2_sha':'1deca41de9ac6d8ec2e0cbfbbbdd294b97d480a5',
 'task3_sha':'73ee42d1ea911f4368e576db9db9302f2e5ee864',
 'task4_sha':'this_commit',
 'transport_records':transport_records,
 'provider_selected':provider.get('selected_provider'),
 'telegram_outbox':'governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl'
}
contour['last_result']='BEM-540 full system autotest '+final_status
contour['blocker']=blocker
contour_status_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

pending_text=pending.read_text(errors='ignore') if pending.exists() else '# BEM-540 Full System Autotest Roadmap\n'
done.write_text(pending_text+'\n\n---\n\n## Result\nBEM-540 '+final_status+'. Full system autotest completed.\n\nEvidence:\n- Task 1 system preflight: 5a17ca55247e2794413019a10dd36948f48e28cf\n- Task 2 curator internal cycle: 1deca41de9ac6d8ec2e0cbfbbbdd294b97d480a5\n- Task 3 provider+telegram: 73ee42d1ea911f4368e576db9db9302f2e5ee864\n- Task 4 final audit: final commit\n\nBlocker: '+('null' if all_ok else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False))+'\n')
if pending.exists():
    pending.unlink()
    changed_files.append(str(pending))

report=reports/'bem540_full_system_autotest_pass_report.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-540 | Full System Autotest | '+final_status+'\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:06 (UTC+3)\n\n## Roadmap из 4 задач\n| Задача | Проверка | SHA | Статус |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| Task 1 | System preflight + curator intake | 5a17ca55247e2794413019a10dd36948f48e28cf | PASS |\n| Task 2 | Curator-driven internal role cycle | 1deca41de9ac6d8ec2e0cbfbbbdd294b97d480a5 | PASS |\n| Task 3 | Provider failover + Telegram outbox | 73ee42d1ea911f4368e576db9db9302f2e5ee864 | PASS |\n| Task 4 | Final audit + closure | this commit | '+final_status+' |\n\n## Validated subsystems\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| External entry | GPT created task only through curator intake | governance/internal_contour/curator_intake_contract.md |\n| Curator routing | Full internal chain completed through curator-owned flow | role artifacts under governance/internal_contour/tests/bem540 |\n| Analyst | Analyst plan created | analyst_system_plan.md |\n| Auditor | Review and final review created | auditor_plan_review.md, auditor_final_review.md |\n| Executor | Development artifact created | system_development_artifact.md |\n| Transport | Required records appended to results.jsonl | record types: '+', '.join(sorted(set(transport_records)))+' |\n| State | role_cycle_state and contour_status updated | state files changed in final commit |\n| Provider failover | Claude failed -> GPT reserve synthetic decision | provider_failover_decision.json + provider_contour_state.json |\n| Telegram reporting | Canonical outbox payload queued without secrets/live token | governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl |\n\n## Final checks\n```json\n'+json.dumps({'all_ok':all_ok,'record_ok':record_ok,'checks':checks,'transport_records':transport_records}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n```\n\n## Blocker\n'+('null' if all_ok else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False))+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem540_task4_final_system_closure.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-540 Task 4 '+final_status+': full system autotest final closure. all_ok='+str(all_ok)+', record_ok='+str(record_ok)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(transport),str(role_state_path),str(contour_status_path),str(done),str(report),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-540 Task 4 final system audit and closure completed')
"""
